Name: External Temperature at Time of Failure
A-B-A Swap Method Confirmation
tvnt__Question__c:
A-B-A Swap Method Confirmation

The A‑B Swap Method is a simple cross‑check test, which can confirm the observed issue is not systemic.

1. Replace the suspected component (A) from the original failing panel.

2. Replace the suspected component (A) with a known good component (B) and check if the hte panel now working properly.

3. Replace known good component (B) with original component (A), see if the same failure occurs.

4. if failure reoccurs reinstall component (B) if the failure does not repeat keep component (A) installed and continue troubleshooting.
tvnt__Response__c: Please check this checkbox for A-B-A Swap Method Confirmation
